title: ranunculus nemoricola
intro: Ranunculus nemoricola, also known as alpine buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Ranunculus. The medicinal properties of Ranunculus nemoricola lie in its roots and leaves, which contain alkaloids and glycosides with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of using Ranunculus nemoricola include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to use it under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
